channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Top AI tools such as OpenClaw and Github Copilot can be hijacked to create new massive botnets
item.description: Researchers find nine of the most popular AI platforms are susceptible to a new attack that exploits hallucinations to set up a botnet.

item.title: Roblox is shutting down its video chat service
item.description: Roblox will be shutting down Roblox Connect, its video calling service introduced in 2023. Roblox Connect let you video chat with other people using your Roblox avatar, which would be able to mimic the movements you were making in real life. You could also run around with people on the call in a shared virtual […]

item.title: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
item.description: This weekend, cinephiles across the world will march to their local theaters to feast their eyes on Christopher Nolan's new adaptation of The Odyssey. It's on track to rake in anywhere between $80-$100 million in just a few days. People are clearly excited to see how Nolan uses cutting-edge filmmaking tech to make the Homeric […]

item.title: Placer deux ventilateurs face à face pour rafraîchir sa maison : l’astuce fonctionne vraiment
item.description: La technique des deux ventilateurs croisés promet de faire baisser la température de la maison de 5 °C sans allumer la climatisation. Elle marche vraiment, mais à des conditions précises que personne ne rappelle jamais.

item.title: Daniel Ek’s body-scanning startup Neko Health raises another $700M
item.description: Neko Health has developed proprietary body-scanning technology, which it couples with bloodwork, to assess a person's health.

item.title: L’émulateur KytyPS5 réussit à lancer la version PS5 de GTA V sur PC
item.description: Un émulateur fait démarrer la version PS5 de GTA V sur un PC Windows. On est encore très loin d'y jouer, mais l'émulation PS5 avance à toute vitesse.

item.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
item.description: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

item.title: Apple augmente discrètement le prix d’AppleCare+ pour Mac et iPad
item.description: Apple relève encore ses prix, cette fois sur l'extension de garantie AppleCare+ pour Mac et iPad. La hausse est modeste, et pour l'instant limitée aux États-Unis.

item.title: You could win $2 million playing Monopoly—but not the way you think
item.description: Fans of Monopoly can now apply to compete in Netflix’s newest reality series, which promises high-stakes gameplay inspired by the classic board game. For generations, Monopoly has let players dream of becoming real estate tycoons. Now, Netflix is turning that fantasy into a $2 million reality competition.

item.title: This software team will charge you $10,000 a week to remove all AI-generated code from your systems — and use AI to do it
item.description: For $10,000 a week, a three-man team will use AI coding agents to find lengthy AI generated codebases within your system’s internal applications, and trim fat.

item.title: Warren Buffett calls Bill Gates’s Epstein ties ‘distasteful,’ but not behind Gates Foundation cuts
item.description: Buffett said in 2024 that he planned to cut off donations to the Gates Foundation after he died and let his three children decide how to distribute the rest of his fortune. Billionaire Warren Buffett said Wednesday that his decision to cut the Gates Foundation out of his charitable giving is more about believing his three kids are ready to handle giving away his entire fortune than it is about Bill Gates’s ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein....

item.title: Microsoft patches bug in video game Age of Empires II
item.description: The vulnerability in the decades-old game could have allowed hackers to take over victims’ computers with a malicious game invite.

item.title: Enshittification
item.description: Bryan, a food broker from Michigan, wasn't sure if he'd be able to make it to urgent care in time. He started feeling off on Thursday, and by Saturday, he was having to use the bathroom every 15 to 30 minutes. "It's no joke about the explosive diarrhea," Bryan, who asked that his last name […]

item.title: OpenAI launches a physical keypad for controlling agents
item.description: OpenAI's collaboration with keyboard maker Work Louder is available to order today.

item.title: AI Isn’t Smarter Than a Baby—Yet
item.description: Babies are tremendous learning machines, and key advances for AI may soon be found in the architecture of their little brains.

item.title: Apple quietly hid a big change coming for CarPlay with iOS 27
item.description: Apple announced the new CarPlay feature not long after Google announced a similar update for Android Auto.

item.title: Something’s glowing on the Pixel 11’s camera bar
item.description: A new teaser for Google's upcoming Pixel 11 lineup reveals that the phones will feature some kind of glowing orb on the camera bar, as reported by 9to5Google. Google's store page for the Pixel 11 has a short video that shows the glowing, color-shifting orb to the one side of the camera bar. The store […]

item.title: Apple bans home services from its upcoming Maps ads
item.description: Apple has published the policies governing its upcoming Maps advertising business, revealing a strategy that differs from Google’s. The new rules prohibit home services businesses like plumbers, electricians, locksmiths, and roofers from advertising on Apple Maps, along with several other sensitive categories, suggesting Apple is taking a more curated approach to these ads....

item.title: Cohere VP says enterprise AI sovereignty requires control of the full agent stack at VB Transform 2026
item.description: Hundreds of enterprise leaders and technical experts packed the main ballroom of the luxurious Hotel Nia in Menlo Park this week for VB Transform 2026, the year's preeminent conference on using generative AI agents to drive business outcomes. Rachad Alao, vice president of product engineering at the rising Canadian enterprise AI startup Cohere, joined VentureBeat CEO and editor-in-chief Matt Marshall for a fireside chat about building agentic systems without surrendering sensitive data, infrastructure control, or the ability to change vendors.Alao, who previously led responsible AI and trust a...

item.title: Cheaper than an iPhone: Price of record-breaking Ukraine AI FPV drone slashed to $500 as range increases sixfold to 68 miles
item.description: The Vyriy 15 FPV is a $500-class Ukrainian drone that incorporates AI terminal guidance and reportedly hit Russian logistics 110 km away.
